skills.description: Quickstart for the KB Labs platform: verify install, locate state, find common commands
Scaffold a new KB Labs plugin (cli/core/contracts packages) following the platform-standard layout
Create a new KB Labs product/service with canonical bootstrap, health, observability, and tests
Diagnose KB Labs platform issues: stuck services, dirty submodules, port conflicts, broken builds
Discover what is installed in a KB Labs project: services, plugins, configuration, and entry points
Safely update the installed KB Labs platform via kb-create update, including diff review
